blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 12".
